Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Fried by conflicts and relationships

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-07-26 · 2 answers
How can you help people who have been fried by conflicts with devotees, politics and have left the movement?
They have faith in the philosophy but not in how it is being practiced by devotees...you know.
Any suggestions?
user [6] · 2007-07-26
Look for the right association (so scarce in this material world), and keep it, cause nobody will stay if not having at least one close friend in KC.
user [12] · 2007-07-26
Abhiram since you are asking as a friend to them, so I suppose you can only listen to their problems. People have real complaints about the way things happened or the way they were treated and we really dont have answers to all of their problems or complaints. We can only try to be a friend. If their mind is open we can give spiritual knowledge of how we create our suffering. We should deal with them so that they can become receptive to spiritual values.
